    1: if(!self.define){let e,a={};const s=(s,c)=>(s=new URL(s+".js",c).href,a[s]||new Promise(a=>{if("document"in self){const e.NetworkOnly,"GET"),e.registerRoute(({request:e,url:a})=>"navigate"===e.mode&&self.origin===a.origin,new e.NetworkOnly,"GET"),e.registerRoute(({url:e})=>self.origin===e.origin&&e.pathname.startsWith("/_next/static/"),new e.StaleWhileRevalidate({cacheName:"next-static-assets",plugins:[new e.ExpirationPlugin({maxEntries:128,maxAgeSeconds:86400})]}),"GET"),e.registerRoute(/\/_next\/image\?url=.+$/i,new e.CacheFirst({cacheName:"next-image-assets",plugins:[new e.ExpirationPlugin({maxEntries:128,maxAgeSeconds:86400})]}),"GET"),e.registerRoute(/\.(?:png|jpg|jpeg|gif|webp|svg|ico)$/i,new e.CacheFirst({cacheName:"static-image-assets",plugins:[new e.ExpirationPlugin({maxEntries:128,maxAgeSeconds:86400})]}),"GET")});
